content.en:
Click!!

Under the siege of many supreme powerhouses, the robber beast gradually declined.

It's not that the beasts don't have intelligence, it's just that their intelligence is very low.

So, seeing that it was in a weak position, it wanted to flee.

Many strong people chased and killed all the way, but the defense of the robbery beast was too terrifying, if it didn't have any powerful means of attack, otherwise so many supreme powerhouses present would not be able to defeat it at all.

The robber beasts could not leave the Dark Forbidden Realm, so they could only escape within the Dark Forbidden Realm, and they could not get rid of these foreign powerhouses at all.

Eventually, in a silent void.

The beasts were desperate, fighting frantically with many supreme beings.

Bang!!!!

A battle array was torn apart, six of the strongest of the first level were killed, and the other supreme were also seriously injured.

Of course, this beast was also seriously injured again by the other supreme powers, making its injuries even worse.

Then, one by one, the battle arrays collapsed, and the battle formations could no longer be used.

So, everyone attacked the beast with their own strength.

In a short period of time, the number of the fallen powerhouses in the Exotic Land reached double digits, and there were many very seriously injured powerhouses.

These supreme beings were on the verge of death, and they didn't dare to interfere anymore, so they stayed away from here one by one.

In the end, only the third-level supreme powerhouses of the six super-name-level forces were still besieging the beasts here.

Compared with the beginning, the strength of the robber beast is less than one-third, and the injuries are not proportional, the body covered in scales is already extremely embarrassed, countless scales are shattered, and the blood of the robber beast is constantly gushing out, and it cannot heal at all.

"Keep it up!"

One by one, the strongest man yelled.

At this time, every supreme being was very excited, once the beast fell, the benefits would be too many.

Ye Tian was also among them, he was very low-key and did not deliberately show his strength.

Moreover, the goal of the six super-name-level forces is now to kill the robbery beast, so naturally they will not care about him.

It didn't take long for the strength of the beast to drop to an extremely low level, and its whole body was full of holes, and it was unable to recover from its injuries at all, and it was no longer able to resist the attacks of the strongest people.

Eventually, it succumbed to its injuries and died.

At the moment of the beast's death, its physical body began to disintegrate.

A large number of Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals flew out, and a cloud of black blood flew out, and this ball of blood was filled with a terrifying aura.

I saw that the strongest people went to snatch that black blood for the first time, and this was their goal.

Of course, the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal is also their goal, but the first target is naturally black blood, and then they will snatch the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

Every supreme being longed for this mass of black blood, and Ye Tian naturally knew that it was a good thing, so he no longer hid his strength.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian showed all his combat power, grabbed the black blood as quickly as possible, and immediately began to snatch those Origin Rule Robbery Crystals.

In the void, one by one, big hands grabbed one Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal after another, and most of them fell into Ye Tian's hands.

At this moment, where do these supreme powerhouses still not understand!

Ye Tian was not injured at all, and he hid his strength, his real strength may not be as good as that of the Tribulation Beast, but he has at least one-third of the strength of the Tribulation Beast.

And they were injured one by one, and their combat effectiveness dropped greatly, where could they compete for Ye Tian!

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, hand over the blood, it's not something you can snatch!!!

One by one, the strongest men surrounded Ye Tian and threatened.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

The six super-name-level forces stopped talking nonsense and besieged Ye Tian together.

At this moment, Ye Tian showed almost invincible strength, sweeping almost everything.

But they didn't kill the six super-name-level forces, after all, with his current strength, it was not enough to compete with these six super-name-level forces, in case he killed these supreme powers, the six invincible powerhouses behind the six super-name-level forces would make a move, he could only hide and wait for the catastrophe to pass.

Therefore, he will not die unless he has to.

Dark Forbidden Realm, in the Void.

One by one, the strongest people were seriously injured, or they were lying upside down, or half-kneeling, or trembling, and they all stared at Ye Tian in unison.

"Ten Thousand Laws Ancestor, you are really amazing, you have created so many supreme ancestral techniques, no wonder your strength is so terrifying, but if you don't enter the invincible ancestor for a day, you are not qualified to be an enemy of super-name forces!" said a supreme powerhouse.

Ye Tian sighed: "I don't want to be your enemy, you have to be my enemy, I'm curious, what is the use of the so-called blood robbery, why do you all want to fight for it?"

"It's a secret!"

The strongest of the six super-famous forces didn't seem to want to say it.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "If you say it, maybe I can trade the blood robbery with you!"

Trade for blood?

The powerhouses of the six super-name forces are a little excited, if they can trade, it is naturally the best.

"What do you want?"

The representative of the six super-famous forces spoke.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and said, "I want to know how to impact the Invincible Ancestor, there should be an invincible-level existence among your six super-name-level forces, you should know this secret, right?

Immediately, a powerful man communicated with Ye Tian and said his chips.

In fact, one blood robbery can be taken by one person at most, and if it is divided, the effect will not work, after all, this is just a blood robbery of a robbery beast.

In the end, a third-level supreme powerhouse of the Firmament Sword Tomb proposed a deal that would be difficult for Ye Tian to refuse.

The second-order gate manufacturing method, the secret of the strongest to impact the invincible, and there are also ten origin rule robbery crystals, these ten are not the origin rules of the same exotic world, but belong to ten exotic worlds, which is not easy to collect.

"The strongest of the Firmament Sword Tomb, the Wuhai Sword Ancestor, we can trade!"

Ye Tian chose the Wuhai Sword Ancestor.

When the other powerhouses saw Ye Tian trading with the Wuhai Sword Ancestor, they were extremely jealous.

The key secret of the strongest man's impact on the invincible is nothing, but the manufacturing method of the second-order gate is extremely rare, and few people among the strongest people know it, and some of the many supreme people present do know it, but they make an oath not to say it, so only the second-order gate manufacturing method obtained by accident can be traded.

It just so happened that the Wuhai Sword Ancestor had exterminated a force and obtained the second-order gate manufacturing method, so he traded it.

Ye Tian handed over the Blood Tribulation to the Wuhai Sword Ancestor, and he obtained the second-order gate manufacturing method and the secret of the strongest to attack the invincible from the Wuhai Sword Ancestor, as well as ten Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals.

"Goodbye!"

Ye Tian left.

And the Wuhai Sword Ancestor quickly retreated under the support of the other strongest people in the Firmament Sword Tomb, and several major battles broke out during the period, but in the end, the Wuhai Sword Ancestor returned to the Firmament Sword Tomb.

Of course, the other forces were not without harvest, and they also harvested some Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, as well as materials for Beast Robbery.

Xuanxu Ancestral Realm.

After Ye Tian came back, he immediately began to study the secrets in his mind about how to impact the Invincible Ancestor, and these secrets were like inheritances, which could only be obtained through inheritance, and could not be said or written.

Soon, Ye Tian finished accepting the inheritance, and finally understood how the Supreme Ancestor should impact the Invincible Ancestor.
